---
title: "DKTK-ROG validation: cluster-wise DEG + pathway enrichment"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Differential expression (limma) between K-means clusters of the DKTK-ROG
# cohort, followed by CAMERA / clusterProfiler pathway enrichment. Inputs
# come from DKTK_DATA; figures and tables are written to DKTK_OUT.
source(here::here("config.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width = 14, fig.height = 8)
library(oligo)
library(biomaRt)
library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(limma)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
```

# Load and preprocess expression data

```{r}
load(file = file.path(DKTK_DATA, "datarma.rda"))
boxplot(exprs(data.rma))
```

```{r}
probesets <- rownames(data.rma) 
probesets.corr <- gsub("\\.1", "", probesets)
rownames(data.rma) <- probesets.corr
fData(data.rma) <- as.data.frame(probesets.corr)
```

```{r}
ensembl <- biomaRt::useMart("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")
annotLookup <- biomaRt::getBM(attributes = c("affy_hta_2_0",
                              "ensembl_gene_id",
                              "external_gene_name"
                            ),
               filters = "with_affy_hta_2_0",
               values = TRUE,
               mart = ensembl) 
```

```{r}
indicesLookup <- match(probesets.corr, annotLookup$affy_hta_2_0)
indicesLookup <- data.frame(probesets.corr, annotLookup[indicesLookup,])

indicesLookup$control <- ifelse(
  is.na(indicesLookup$external_gene_name),
  ifelse(grepl("(TC.*hg)", probesets.corr), 
         FALSE, 
         TRUE),
  FALSE)

data_dktk.final <- subset(data.rma, !indicesLookup$control)
```

```{r}
fData(data_dktk.final) <- left_join(fData(data_dktk.final), indicesLookup[1:4])
```

```{r}
result <- tibble(fData(data_dktk.final)$probesets.corr, 
                 fData(data_dktk.final)$external_gene_name, 
                 .name_repair = ~ c("Probeset", "External_gene_name"))
result <- bind_cols(result, as_tibble(exprs(data_dktk.final)))

format_sample_id <- function(id) {
  prefix <- gsub("(DKTKRO1[ab])(\\d+)", "\\1", id)
  num <- gsub("(DKTKRO1[ab])(\\d+)", "\\2", id)
  num_padded <- stringr::str_pad(num, width = 3, pad = "0")
  formatted_id <- paste0(prefix, num_padded)
  return(formatted_id)
}

original_colnames <- colnames(result)
new_colnames <- gsub("(.+)\\.CEL", "DKTKRO1\\1", original_colnames)
formatted_colnames <- sapply(new_colnames, format_sample_id)
colnames(result) <- formatted_colnames
result <- result %>%
  dplyr::rename(Probeset = ProbesetProbeset, External_gene_name = External_gene_nameExternal_gene_name)
```

```{r}
data_dktk <- result
data_dktk <- data_dktk %>% filter(External_gene_name != "")
```

```{r}
data_dktk <- data.table::data.table(data_dktk)

nondups <- data_dktk[!(
  duplicated(data_dktk, by = "External_gene_name") | 
    duplicated(data_dktk, fromLast = TRUE, by="External_gene_name")
),]
dups <- data_dktk[(
  duplicated(data_dktk, by = "External_gene_name") | 
                 duplicated(data_dktk, fromLast = TRUE, by="External_gene_name")
),]

log_median <- function(x) {
  n <- length(x)
  s <- sort(x)
  r <- 0:1
  ifelse(n %% 2 == 1, 
         s[(n+1)/2], 
         exp(median(log(s[n/2+r])))
  )
}

patient_cols <- which(!(colnames(dups) %in% c("Probeset", "External_gene_name")))

dups <- dups %>% 
  group_by(External_gene_name) %>%
  summarise_at(.vars = names(.)[patient_cols],
               .funs = log_median)

data_dktk <- rbind(nondups[,-1], dups)
```

# Load clinical data

```{r}
dktk_adjuvant <- read.csv(file.path(DKTK_DATA, "dktk_adjuvant.csv"), check.names = FALSE)

samples <- colnames(data_dktk)[-1]

dktk_adjuvant_microarray <- dktk_adjuvant %>%
  filter(`Participant ID` %in% samples)
```

# Prepare expression and metadata

```{r}
metadata_adjuvant <- as.data.frame(dktk_adjuvant_microarray)
rownames(metadata_adjuvant) <- metadata_adjuvant[,1]
metadata_adjuvant <- metadata_adjuvant[, -1]

data_adjuvant <- as.data.frame(data_dktk)
rownames(data_adjuvant) <- data_adjuvant[,1]
data_adjuvant <- data_adjuvant[,-1]

common_row_names <- intersect(colnames(data_adjuvant), rownames(metadata_adjuvant))
data_adjuvant <- data_adjuvant[, common_row_names]

expression_data_adjuvant <- data.frame(lapply(data_adjuvant, as.numeric), row.names = rownames(data_adjuvant))
expression_data_adjuvant_t <- t(expression_data_adjuvant)

metadata_adjuvant <- metadata_adjuvant[match(colnames(expression_data_adjuvant), rownames(metadata_adjuvant)), ]
```

# K-means clustering

```{r}
final_gene <- c("RIBC2", "TCAM1P", "SMC1B", "STAG3", "SYCP2")

scaled_patients <- scale(expression_data_adjuvant_t[, final_gene], center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)

kmeans_clustering <- function(data) {
  set.seed(42)
  kmeans_result <- kmeans(data, centers = 3, nstart = 100, iter.max = 10, algorithm = "Hartigan-Wong")
  cluster_means <- tapply(rowMeans(data), kmeans_result$cluster, mean)
  
  if (cluster_means[1] > cluster_means[2] && cluster_means[1] > cluster_means[3]) {
    high <- 1; medium <- ifelse(cluster_means[2] > cluster_means[3], 2, 3); low <- ifelse(cluster_means[2] > cluster_means[3], 3, 2)
  } else if (cluster_means[2] > cluster_means[1] && cluster_means[2] > cluster_means[3]) {
    high <- 2; medium <- ifelse(cluster_means[1] > cluster_means[3], 1, 3); low <- ifelse(cluster_means[1] > cluster_means[3], 3, 1)
  } else {
    high <- 3; medium <- ifelse(cluster_means[1] > cluster_means[2], 1, 2); low <- ifelse(cluster_means[1] > cluster_means[2], 2, 1)
  }
  
  cluster <- as.factor(kmeans_result$cluster)
  levels(cluster)[high] <- "High CT Panel Expression"
  levels(cluster)[medium] <- "Intermediate CT Panel Expression"
  levels(cluster)[low] <- "Low CT Panel Expression"
  
  return(list(cluster_labels = cluster, centroids = kmeans_result$centers))
}

clustering_results <- kmeans_clustering(scaled_patients[, final_gene])
expression_data_adjuvant_t <- as.data.frame(expression_data_adjuvant_t)
expression_data_adjuvant_t <- tibble::rownames_to_column(expression_data_adjuvant_t, "Patient_ID")
expression_data_adjuvant_t$DEG.kmeans <- clustering_results$cluster_labels
```

# DEG analysis: High vs Low CT panel

```{r}
md_HL <- metadata_adjuvant %>% mutate(sample_id = rownames(.))
expression_data_adjuvant_t$sample_id <- expression_data_adjuvant_t$Patient_ID

# Merge to get cluster info
md_HL <- left_join(md_HL, expression_data_adjuvant_t[, c("sample_id", "DEG.kmeans")], by = "sample_id")

md_HL <- md_HL %>%
  filter(`DEG.kmeans` %in% c("High CT Panel Expression", "Low CT Panel Expression"))

samples_HL <- md_HL$sample_id
expr_HL <- expression_data_adjuvant[, samples_HL, drop = FALSE]
```

# Define DEG function

```{r}
compare_limma_full <- function(expr_data, md) {
  CT <- factor(md$`DEG.kmeans`, levels = c("High CT Panel Expression", "Low CT Panel Expression"))
  levels(CT) <- make.names(levels(CT))
  
  design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + CT)
  colnames(design) <- levels(CT)
  
  contrast <- makeContrasts(Low_vs_High = `Low.CT.Panel.Expression` - `High.CT.Panel.Expression`,
                            levels = design)
  
  fit <- lmFit(expr_data, design)
  fit <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast)
  fit <- eBayes(fit)
  
  cat("decideTests summary:\n")
  print(summary(decideTests(fit)))
  
  deg <- topTable(fit, n = Inf, adjust.method = "BH")
  deg <- deg[order(deg$adj.P.Val), ]
  return(deg)
}
```

# Define detection indicators and run DEG

```{r}
detection_indicators <- list(
  "P16" = "P16",
  "HPV16DNA" = "HPV16 DNS",
  "HPV16RNA" = "HPV16 RNA",
  "Double_P16_HPV16DNA" = "Double_P16_HPV16DNA",
  "Double_P16_HPV16RNA" = "Double_P16_HPV16RNA",
  "Double_HPV16DNA_HPV16RNA" = "Double_HPV16DNA_HPV16RNA",
  "Triple" = "Triple_Positive",
  "Any" = "Any_Positive"
)

# Create detection indicator columns from metadata
md_HL <- md_HL %>%
  mutate(
    P16_col = ifelse(P16 == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    HPV16DNA_col = ifelse(`HPV16 DNS` == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    HPV16RNA_col = ifelse(`HPV16 RNA` == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    Double_P16_HPV16DNA = ifelse(P16 == 1 & `HPV16 DNS` == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    Double_P16_HPV16RNA = ifelse(P16 == 1 & `HPV16 RNA` == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    Double_HPV16DNA_HPV16RNA = ifelse(`HPV16 DNS` == 1 & `HPV16 RNA` == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    Triple_Positive = ifelse(P16 == 1 & `HPV16 DNS` == 1 & `HPV16 RNA` == 1, "Positive", "Negative"),
    Any_Positive = ifelse(P16 == 1 | `HPV16 DNS` == 1 | `HPV16 RNA` == 1, "Positive", "Negative")
  )

deg_results_full <- list()
for(name in names(detection_indicators)) {
  ind_col <- detection_indicators[[name]]
  
  # Map to actual column names in md_HL
  if(name == "P16") ind_col_actual <- "P16_col"
  else if(name == "HPV16DNA") ind_col_actual <- "HPV16DNA_col"
  else if(name == "HPV16RNA") ind_col_actual <- "HPV16RNA_col"
  else ind_col_actual <- ind_col
  
  md_sub <- md_HL %>% filter((!!sym(ind_col_actual)) == "Positive")
  
  if(nrow(md_sub) < 10) {
    cat("Not enough samples for", name, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  common_samples <- intersect(md_sub$sample_id, colnames(expression_data_adjuvant))
  md_sub <- md_sub %>% filter(sample_id %in% common_samples)
  expr_sub <- expression_data_adjuvant[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
  expr_sub <- expr_sub[, match(md_sub$sample_id, colnames(expr_sub))]
  
  cat("Detection indicator", name, "-> metadata samples:", nrow(md_sub),
      "and expression columns:", ncol(expr_sub), "\n")
  
  deg_full <- compare_limma_full(expr_sub, md_sub)
  deg_results_full[[name]] <- deg_full
}

sig_threshold <- 0.05
sig_counts <- sapply(deg_results_full, function(df) sum(df$adj.P.Val < sig_threshold))
sig_counts_table <- data.frame(Detection_Indicator = names(sig_counts), Significant_DEG_Count = sig_counts)
print(sig_counts_table)
```

# Export DEG tables

```{r}
for(name in names(deg_results_full)) {
  df <- deg_results_full[[name]]
  
  if(is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    cat("Skipping", name, "as no DEGs found\n")
    next
  }
  
  df <- df[, c("logFC", "AveExpr", "t", "P.Value", "adj.P.Val")]
  df$gene_symbol <- rownames(df)
  df <- df[, c("gene_symbol", "logFC", "AveExpr", "t", "P.Value", "adj.P.Val")]
  colnames(df) <- c("gene_symbol", "log2FoldChange", "AveExpr", "t", "pvalue", "padj")
  
  filename <- file.path(DKTK_OUT, paste0("deg_", name, "_formatted.csv"))
  write.csv(df, file = filename, row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Saved DEG table for", name, "as", filename, "\n")
}
```

# Pathway analysis with CAMERA

```{r}
library(msigdbr)

msigdb_hallmark <- msigdbr::msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H")
gene_sets <- split(msigdb_hallmark$gene_symbol, msigdb_hallmark$gs_name)
```

```{r}
camera_results_list <- list()

for(name in names(deg_results_full)) {
  if(is.null(deg_results_full[[name]]) || nrow(deg_results_full[[name]]) == 0) {
    cat("Skipping", name, "as no DEGs found\n")
    next
  }
  
  ind_col <- detection_indicators[[name]]
  
  if(name == "P16") ind_col_actual <- "P16_col"
  else if(name == "HPV16DNA") ind_col_actual <- "HPV16DNA_col"
  else if(name == "HPV16RNA") ind_col_actual <- "HPV16RNA_col"
  else ind_col_actual <- ind_col
  
  md_sub <- md_HL %>% filter((!!sym(ind_col_actual)) == "Positive")
  
  if(nrow(md_sub) < 10) {
    cat("Not enough samples for", name, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  common_samples <- intersect(md_sub$sample_id, colnames(expression_data_adjuvant))
  if(length(common_samples) < 10) {
    cat("Not enough common samples for", name, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  md_sub <- md_sub %>% filter(sample_id %in% common_samples)
  expr_sub <- expression_data_adjuvant[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
  expr_sub <- expr_sub[, match(md_sub$sample_id, colnames(expr_sub))]
  
  CT <- factor(md_sub$`DEG.kmeans`, levels = c("High CT Panel Expression", "Low CT Panel Expression"))
  levels(CT) <- make.names(levels(CT))
  design_specific <- model.matrix(~ 0 + CT)
  colnames(design_specific) <- levels(CT)
  
  contrast_specific <- makeContrasts(Low_vs_High = `Low.CT.Panel.Expression` - `High.CT.Panel.Expression`,
                                    levels = design_specific)
  contrast_vector <- as.numeric(contrast_specific[,1])
  
  tryCatch({
    camera_res <- camera(expr_sub, gene_sets, design_specific, contrast_vector)
    
    camera_df <- as.data.frame(camera_res)
    camera_df$Pathway <- rownames(camera_df)
    
    camera_df <- camera_df[, c("Pathway", "NGenes", "Direction", "PValue", "FDR")]
    
    camera_results_list[[name]] <- camera_df
    
    csv_filename <- file.path(DKTK_OUT, paste0("pathway_analysis_camera_", name, ".csv"))
    write.csv(camera_df, file = csv_filename, row.names = FALSE)
    
    assign(paste0("camera_result_", name), camera_df, envir = .GlobalEnv)
    
    cat("Saved pathway analysis for", name, "as", csv_filename, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error during CAMERA analysis for", name, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
}
```

# Plot top pathways

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Get top 15 pathways for selected methods
P16_top15 <- camera_result_P16 %>%
  arrange(PValue) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15)

HPV16DNA_top15 <- camera_result_HPV16DNA %>%
  arrange(PValue) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15)

Any_top15 <- camera_result_Any %>%
  arrange(PValue) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15)

selected_camera_results <- list(
  P16 = P16_top15,
  HPV16DNA = HPV16DNA_top15,
  Any = Any_top15
)

camera_combined_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(selected_camera_results), function(name) {
    df <- selected_camera_results[[name]]
    df$Detection <- name
    return(df)
  })
)

p <- ggplot(camera_combined_df, aes(x = -log10(PValue), y = reorder(Pathway, -log10(PValue)), fill = Direction)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~Detection, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Top 15 HALLMARK Pathways (CAMERA)",
       x = "-log10(p-value)",
       y = NULL,
       fill = "Direction") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

print(p)
```
